The '''''Reliance''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]], it guarded the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jardeen IV]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Gendarr evacuated [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arndall Lott]] from the world and established himself as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].

==Description==
The ''Reliance'' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. While under the command of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]], the vessel carried [[Scimitar assault bomber]]s along with a mixed force of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] that had been specially modified by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arndall Lott]]'s [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] to [[Slave circuit|be controlled]] by remote operators.<ref name="WBC" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Reliance'' was commanded by Iolan Gendarr after his promotion to the rank of captain following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The Star Destroyer was assigned to protect the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Imperial Army training center|center]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jardeen IV]]. In the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Iolan Gendarr went rogue alongside [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arndall Lott]], commander of Jardeen IV's [[Walker Operations and Tactics]], They evacuated the planet, forming their own [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] faction. The ''Reliance'' was utilized to attack both [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and civilian bases to secure equipment and supplies. During the raids, [[Scimitar assault bomber]]s were used in conjunction with the slave-rigged [[Walker/Legends|walkers]].<ref name="WBC" />
